holdings.infoBox: PICK is an equity ETF with a total of 389 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 13.87%, Rio Tinto Group at 6.58%, Freeport-McMoRan at 5.84%, Glencore at 4.32%, and Anglo American at 3.46%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Global Metals & Mining Producers ETF (PICK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global metals mining, extraction or production firms, excluding gold and silver mining firms. PICK was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI Select Metals & Mining Producers ex Gold & Silver IMI

data.text: Family offices poured more than $3 billion into tech, media, and telecom companies. But materials attracted the most capital—$4.8 billion.
